title: Execution Lane Result Schema
description: Canonical result emitted by one PopKit execution lane after sandboxed or worktree-based work.

objective.description: The user-facing objective the lane attempted.

sandboxBackend.description: Execution provider used by the lane.

branch.description: Git branch used by the lane, when applicable.

worktreePath.description: Local worktree path used by the lane, when applicable.

providerRunId.description: External provider run ID, when a hosted sandbox is used.

commits.description: Commit SHAs produced by the lane.

kind.description: Artifact type, such as diff, doc, log, screenshot, or eval.

path.description: Path or URL for the artifact.

name.description: Name of the test, eval, review, or smoke check.

command.description: Command or check that was run.

validation.description: Checks used to verify the lane output.

nextAction.description: Recommended next action for the coordinator or user.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for when lane execution started.

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for when lane execution completed.
